caption:
This is your sign to visit Faros this Christmas in London! ✨🎄 @farosrestaurant

Faros is a Mediterranean–Italian restaurant known for its fresh, high-quality ingredients, delicious pizzas, and handcrafted pastas🍝🍕

It blends the relaxed spirit of Italian-Mediterranean dining with modern London energy, offering a warm, welcoming atmosphere that makes you feel at home, whether you’re popping in for a quick bite or settling in for a long meal with friends and family 🤍

Festive aperitivo menu highlights:
✨ Angelo d’Inverno (a rich, velvety blend of brandy, Baileys, and pumpkin spice)
✨ Negroni di Natale (a festive twist on the classic with cranberry and Antica Formula)
✨ Festive Spritzes (Aperol and Hugo, dressed up with Christmassy garnish)
✨ Mulled Wine (infused with warming spices, exclusive to the Oxford Circus bar)

Don’t miss the Truffle Pizza with Santa Claus burrata (layered with white truffle paste and fresh truffle shavings)🎅 

My favourites of the day were the creamy Truffle Pasta and the Salted Caramel Panna Cotta, both absolutely delicious! 

📍 Two locations in London:
Faros Oxford Circus: 22–24 Great Portland St, W1W 8QS
Faros Holborn: 57 Grays Inn Rd, WC1X 8PP
